featureName: ElevenLabs Voice Integration — Shared Twilio Number
description: Inbound voice calls to shared Twilio number routed to ElevenLabs conversational AI. Pre-call routing via phone_team_mappings injects team name, caller info, and conversation history as dynamic variables. Unknown callers get a generic agent that collects everything vocally. Post-call webhook already handles intervention creation.

userStories.title: Voice webhook endpoint
userStories.description: As the system, I want a POST /api/webhooks/voice endpoint that receives inbound Twilio voice calls, validates the signature, does pre-call routing, calls ElevenLabs register-call API, and returns TwiML to Twilio.
acceptanceCriteria: Pre-call lookup via phone_team_mappings → gets team_id, user info
Calls ElevenLabs register-call with agent_id + dynamic_variables
Unknown callers get generic agent (no dynamic context)
userStories.notes: Full voice webhook with pre-call routing. Reuses lookupMappings, runIdentificationCascade, getConversationHistory, getTeamName from existing services. Parallel fetches for team name + user name + address + history. ElevenLabs register-call via raw fetch (no SDK). Graceful fallback TwiML with French Say + Hangup on errors.

userStories.title: ElevenLabs agent prompt with dynamic variables
userStories.description: As the system, I want the ElevenLabs agent system prompt to use dynamic variable placeholders so the voice agent can personalize greetings with caller name, team name, address, and conversation history.
acceptanceCriteria: 4-scenario ETAPE 1 (like WhatsApp): name+address known, only name known, only address known, nothing known
Conversation history section injected when available
userStories.notes: Dynamic variable placeholders in SYSTEM_PROMPT_TEMPLATE. buildSystemPrompt only handles custom_instructions (static). team_name/caller_name/caller_address/conversation_history left as {{}} for ElevenLabs runtime resolution. first_message uses {{team_name}}. updateAgent/createAgent signatures simplified. Callers updated.

userStories.title: Environment config + .env.example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ID documented in .env.example so the voice webhook knows which shared agent to use.
acceptanceCriteria: Voice webhook URL documented in .env.example comments
userStories.notes: Added ELEVENLABS_API_KEY, ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ID, TELNYX_SIP_USERNAME/PASSWORD, voice webhook URL comment. Grouped under 🎙️ ELEVENLABS VOICE AI section.
